sentences.sentence: The market for tourism in remote areas is booming as never before.
sentences.translation: 偏远地区的旅游市场正以前所未有的速度蓬勃发展。

structure.text: The market for tourism in remote areas

difficult_points: for tourism in remote areas 修饰 market，说明市场类型。
as never before 表示前所未有。

expressions.meaning_zh: 以前所未有的速度发展

sentences.sentence: Countries all across the world are actively promoting their 'wilderness' regions - such as mountains, Arctic lands, deserts, small islands and wetlands - to high-spending tourists.
sentences.translation: 世界各国都在积极向高消费游客推介自己的“荒野”地区，如山地、北极地区、沙漠、小岛和湿地。

structure.text: such as mountains, Arctic lands, deserts, small islands and wetlands

difficult_points: 破折号内 such as 列举 wilderness regions；promote A to B 表示向B推介A。
high-spending 是复合形容词，指消费能力高的游客。

sentences.sentence: The attraction of these areas is obvious: by definition, wilderness tourism requires little or no initial investment.
sentences.translation: 这些地区的吸引力显而易见：按定义，荒野旅游几乎不需要初始投资。

structure.text: requires little or no initial investment

difficult_points: 冒号后解释 attraction obvious 的原因；little or no 表示很少或没有。
by definition 表示按照概念本身的定义。

sentences.sentence: But that does not mean that there is no cost.
sentences.translation: 但这并不意味着没有代价。
difficult_points: that 指荒野旅游几乎不需初始投资这一事实。
there is no cost 是存在句，说明并非完全没有代价。

sentences.sentence: As the 1992 United Nations Conference on Environment and Development recognized, these regions are fragile (i.e. highly vulnerable to abnormal pressures) not just in terms of their ecology, but also in terms of the culture of their inhabitants.
sentences.translation: 正如1992年联合国环境与发展会议所认识到的，这些地区不仅生态脆弱（即极易受到异常压力影响），其居民文化也同样脆弱。

structure.text: As the 1992 United Nations Conference on Environment and Development recognized
not just in terms of their ecology, but also in terms of the culture of their inhabitants

difficult_points: As...recognized 是插入语，引用会议共识。
not just...but also... 说明脆弱性同时涉及生态和文化。

sentences.sentence: The three most significant types of fragile environment in these respects, and also in terms of the proportion of the Earth's surface they cover, are deserts, mountains and Arctic areas.
sentences.translation: 在这些方面以及覆盖地球表面比例方面，最重要的三类脆弱环境是沙漠、山地和北极地区。

structure.text: The three most significant types of fragile environment in these respects
and also in terms of the proportion of the Earth's surface they cover

difficult_points: they cover 修饰 proportion，they 指三类环境。
主语很长，谓语 are 后列出三类环境。

sentences.sentence: An important characteristic is their marked seasonality, with harsh conditions prevailing for many months each year.
sentences.translation: 一个重要特征是明显的季节性，每年有数月处于严酷条件之下。

structure.text: with harsh conditions prevailing for many months each year

difficult_points: with + 名词 + 分词构成独立结构，补充季节性表现。
marked 表示显著，prevailing 表示条件持续存在。

sentences.sentence: Consequently, most human activities, including tourism, are limited to quite clearly defined parts of the year.
sentences.translation: 因此，包括旅游在内的大多数人类活动都局限于一年中界限非常明确的时段。

structure.text: quite clearly defined parts of the year

difficult_points: including tourism 是插入举例，修饰 activities。
are limited to 表示被限制在特定时段。

sentences.sentence: Tourists are drawn to these regions by their natural landscape beauty and the unique cultures of their indigenous people.
sentences.translation: 这些地区的自然景观之美和原住民独特的文化吸引着游客。

structure.text: by their natural landscape beauty and the unique cultures of their indigenous people

difficult_points: be drawn to 是“被吸引到”的被动表达。
by 后并列自然景观和文化两种吸引因素。

sentences.sentence: And poor governments in these isolated areas have welcomed the new breed of 'adventure tourist', grateful for the hard currency they bring.
sentences.translation: 这些偏远地区贫穷的政府欢迎新一代“探险游客”，对他们带来的硬通货心怀感激。

structure.text: poor governments in these isolated areas
grateful for the hard currency they bring

difficult_points: grateful 分词/形容词短语补充说明 governments 的态度。
they bring 修饰 hard currency，指游客带来的外汇。

sentences.sentence: For several years now, tourism has been the prime source of foreign exchange in Nepal and Bhutan.
sentences.translation: 数年来，旅游业一直是尼泊尔和不丹外汇的主要来源。

structure.text: the prime source of foreign exchange in Nepal and Bhutan

difficult_points: 现在完成时 has been 与 for...now 搭配，表示持续至今。
prime source 表示最主要来源。

sentences.sentence: Tourism is also a key element in the economies of Arctic zones such as Lapland and Alaska and in desert areas such as Ayers Rock in Australia and Arizona's Monument Valley.
sentences.translation: 旅游业也是北极地区（如拉普兰和阿拉斯加）以及沙漠地区（如澳大利亚艾尔斯岩和亚利桑那纪念碑谷）经济的重要组成部分。

structure.text: in the economies of Arctic zones such as Lapland and Alaska and in desert areas such as Ayers Rock in Australia and Arizona's Monument Valley

difficult_points: 两个 in 短语并列，分别说明北极和沙漠地区。
such as 两次列举具体地点。

sentences.sentence: Once a location is established as a main tourist destination, the effects on the local community are profound.
sentences.translation: 一旦某地被确立为主要旅游目的地，对当地社区的影响就会非常深远。

structure.text: Once a location is established as a main tourist destination
the effects on the local community

difficult_points: Once 引导条件/时间从句；is established as 是被动结构。
effects on the local community 指影响对象，不是社区产生的影响。

sentences.sentence: When hill-farmers, for example, can make more money in a few weeks working as porters for foreign trekkers than they can in a year working in their fields, it is not surprising that many of them give up their farm-work, which is thus left to other members of the family.
sentences.translation: 例如，当山地农民做外国徒步者的挑夫几周赚的钱超过在田里干一年农活的收入时，他们中许多人放弃农活也就不足为奇了，而农活于是留给了家中其他成员。

structure.text: When hill-farmers, for example, can make more money in a few weeks working as porters for foreign trekkers than they can in a year working in their fields
working as porters for foreign trekkers
that many of them give up their farm-work
which is thus left to other members of the family

difficult_points: 比较结构 more...than... 比较两种劳动收入；working 分词分别说明工作方式。
it is not surprising 是形式主语结构，which 修饰 farm-work。

sentences.sentence: In some hill-regions, this has led to a serious decline in farm output and a change in the local diet, because there is insufficient labour to maintain terraces and irrigation systems and tend to crops.
sentences.translation: 在一些山区，这导致农业产量严重下降、当地饮食发生变化，因为没有足够劳动力维护梯田和灌溉系统、照料庄稼。

structure.text: a serious decline in farm output and a change in the local diet
because there is insufficient labour to maintain terraces and irrigation systems and tend to crops

difficult_points: this 指农民放弃农活；because 从句解释后果原因。
to maintain 与 tend 并列，均由 labour 负责。

sentences.sentence: The result has been that many people in these regions have turned to outside supplies of rice and other foods.
sentences.translation: 结果是，这些地区的许多人转而依靠外部供应的大米和其他食物。

structure.text: that many people in these regions have turned to outside supplies of rice and other foods

difficult_points: that 从句说明 result 的内容；have turned to 表示转而依赖。
outside supplies 修饰 rice and other foods 的来源。

sentences.sentence: In Arctic and desert societies, year-round survival has traditionally depended on hunting animals and fish and collecting fruit over a relatively short season.
sentences.translation: 在北极和沙漠社会，全年生存传统上依赖于捕猎动物和鱼类，并在相对短的季节采集水果。

structure.text: hunting animals and fish and collecting fruit over a relatively short season

difficult_points: depend on 后并列 hunting 和 collecting 两个动名词。
year-round 作定语，表示全年。

sentences.sentence: However, as some inhabitants become involved in tourism, they no longer have time to collect wild food; this has led to increasing dependence on bought food and stores.
sentences.translation: 然而，随着一些居民参与旅游业，他们不再有时间采集野生食物；这导致人们越来越依赖购买的食物和储备。

structure.text: as some inhabitants become involved in tourism
they no longer have time to collect wild food
this has led to increasing dependence on bought food and stores

difficult_points: as 从句表示随着变化；become involved in 表示参与。
this 指没有时间采集野食的情况，bought food 与 stores 并列。

sentences.sentence: Tourism is not always the culprit behind such changes.
sentences.translation: 旅游业并不总是这类变化背后的罪魁祸首。
difficult_points: not always 表示并非所有情况都如此。
culprit behind 表示造成变化的主要原因。

sentences.sentence: All kinds of wage labour, or government handouts, tend to undermine traditional survival systems.
sentences.translation: 各种有工资的劳动或政府救济，往往会削弱传统的生存体系。

structure.text: All kinds of wage labour, or government handouts

difficult_points: or government handouts 是对前一主语的并列补充。
tend to 表示一般趋势，undermine 表示逐渐削弱。

sentences.sentence: Whatever the cause, the dilemma is always the same: what happens if these new, external sources of income dry up?
sentences.translation: 无论原因是什么，困境总是一样：如果这些新的外部收入来源枯竭，会发生什么？

structure.text: what happens if these new, external sources of income dry up
if these new, external sources of income dry up

difficult_points: Whatever the cause 表示无论原因如何；dry up 比喻收入来源枯竭。
冒号后是对 dilemma 的具体提问。

sentences.sentence: The physical impact of visitors is another serious problem associated with the growth in adventure tourism.
sentences.translation: 游客造成的物理影响，是探险旅游增长带来的另一个严重问题。

structure.text: another serious problem associated with the growth in adventure tourism
associated with the growth in adventure tourism

difficult_points: associated with 修饰 problem，说明问题来源。
physical impact 指游客对环境造成的实际破坏。

sentences.sentence: Much attention has focused on erosion along major trails, but perhaps more important are the deforestation and impacts on water supplies arising from the need to provide tourists with cooked food and hot showers.
sentences.translation: 大量关注集中于主要步道沿线的侵蚀，但也许更重要的是砍伐森林以及因需要为游客提供熟食和热水淋浴而对水源造成的影响。

structure.text: has focused on erosion along major trails
but perhaps more important are the deforestation and impacts on water supplies
arising from the need to provide tourists with cooked food and hot showers
to provide tourists with cooked food and hot showers

difficult_points: but 后是表语前置倒装，真正主语是 deforestation and impacts。
arising from 修饰两种影响，to provide 使用双宾语。

sentences.sentence: In both mountains and deserts, slow-growing trees are often the main sources of fuel and water supplies may be limited or vulnerable to degradation through heavy use.
sentences.translation: 在山地和沙漠，生长缓慢的树木常常是主要燃料来源，而水源可能有限，或因大量使用而容易退化。

structure.text: slow-growing trees are often the main sources of fuel
and water supplies may be limited or vulnerable to degradation through heavy use

difficult_points: and 连接两个完整分句；slow-growing 作 trees 定语。
limited 与 vulnerable to degradation 并列说明水源状况。

sentences.sentence: Stories about the problems of tourism have become legion in the last few years.
sentences.translation: 近几年，关于旅游问题的报道已变得数不胜数。

structure.text: Stories about the problems of tourism

difficult_points: legion 作形容词，表示大量、数不胜数。
现在完成时说明报道数量近年持续增加。

sentences.sentence: Yet it does not have to be a problem.
sentences.translation: 然而，它不一定非得成为问题。
difficult_points: it 指旅游业及其影响；does not have to 表示不必然。
not have to 与 must not 不同，这里不是禁止。

sentences.sentence: Although tourism inevitably affects the region in which it takes place, the costs to these fragile environments and their local cultures can be minimized.
sentences.translation: 虽然旅游业不可避免地影响所在地区，但对这些脆弱环境及当地文化的代价可以降到最低。

structure.text: Although tourism inevitably affects the region in which it takes place
the costs to these fragile environments and their local cultures

difficult_points: in which 修饰 region；can be minimized 是被动语态。
Although 让步从句承认影响不可避免，主句强调代价可控制。

sentences.sentence: Indeed, it can even be a vehicle for reinvigorating local cultures, as has happened with the Sherpas of Nepal's Khumbu Valley and in some Alpine villages.
sentences.translation: 事实上，旅游甚至可以成为振兴当地文化的工具，尼泊尔昆布谷的夏尔巴人和一些阿尔卑斯山村庄已经出现了这种情况。

structure.text: a vehicle for reinvigorating local cultures
as has happened with the Sherpas of Nepal's Khumbu Valley and in some Alpine villages

difficult_points: vehicle for doing 是“促进某事的工具”；as has happened 倒装，表示类似情况已发生。
reinvigorating 是动名词，说明 vehicle 的用途。

sentences.sentence: And a growing number of adventure tourism operators are trying to ensure that their activities benefit the local population and environment over the long term.
sentences.translation: 越来越多的探险旅游运营商正努力确保其活动从长远看惠及当地人口和环境。

structure.text: a growing number of adventure tourism operators
that their activities benefit the local population and environment over the long term

difficult_points: a growing number of 后接复数谓语 are。
ensure 后接 that 宾语从句，benefit 同时支配 population 和 environment。

sentences.sentence: In the Swiss Alps, communities have decided that their future depends on integrating tourism more effectively with the local economy.
sentences.translation: 在瑞士阿尔卑斯山区，社区已决定其未来取决于更有效地把旅游业融入当地经济。

structure.text: that their future depends on integrating tourism more effectively with the local economy

difficult_points: depends on 后接动名词 integrating；with 表示融入关系。
现在完成时 have decided 表示已经作出的决定。

sentences.sentence: Local concern about the rising number of second home developments in the Swiss Pays d'Enhaut resulted in limits being imposed on their growth.
sentences.translation: 当地对瑞士昂高地区第二住宅开发数量增加的担忧，导致其增长受到限制。

structure.text: Local concern about the rising number of second home developments in the Swiss Pays d'Enhaut
limits being imposed on their growth

difficult_points: result in 后接带逻辑主语的动名词被动结构。
their 指 second home developments，growth 是其增长。

sentences.sentence: There has also been a renaissance in communal cheese production in the area, providing the locals with a reliable source of income that does not depend on outside visitors.
sentences.translation: 该地区的公共奶酪生产也复兴了，为当地人提供了不依赖外来游客的可靠收入来源。

structure.text: There has also been a renaissance in communal cheese production in the area
providing the locals with a reliable source of income
that does not depend on outside visitors

difficult_points: There has been 结构的真正主语是 a renaissance。
providing 使用双宾语；that 修饰 source of income。

sentences.sentence: Many of the Arctic tourist destinations have been exploited by outside companies, who employ transient workers and repatriate most of the profits to their home base.
sentences.translation: 许多北极旅游目的地一直被外来公司开发利用，这些公司雇用临时工，并将大部分利润汇回总部。

structure.text: Many of the Arctic tourist destinations
have been exploited by outside companies
who employ transient workers and repatriate most of the profits to their home base

difficult_points: have been exploited 是现在完成时被动，who 指 outside companies。
employ 与 repatriate 并列，home base 指公司总部。

sentences.sentence: But some Arctic communities are now operating tour businesses themselves, thereby ensuring that the benefits accrue locally.
sentences.translation: 但一些北极社区现在亲自经营旅游企业，从而确保收益留在当地。

structure.text: are now operating tour businesses themselves
thereby ensuring that the benefits accrue locally

difficult_points: themselves 强调社区亲自经营；thereby 表示由此产生的结果。
accrue locally 表示收益在当地积累。

sentences.sentence: For instance, a native corporation in Alaska, employing local people, is running an air tour from Anchorage to Kotzebue, where tourists eat Arctic food, walk on the tundra and watch local musicians and dancers.
sentences.translation: 例如，阿拉斯加一家本土公司雇用当地人，经营从安克雷奇到科策布的空中观光；游客在那里品尝北极食物、在苔原上行走并观看当地音乐家和舞者。

structure.text: is running an air tour from Anchorage to Kotzebue
where tourists eat Arctic food, walk on the tundra and watch local musicians and dancers

difficult_points: employing 修饰 corporation；where 修饰 Kotzebue。
where 从句中 eat、walk、watch 三个动作并列。

sentences.sentence: Native people in the desert regions of the American Southwest have followed similar strategies, encouraging tourists to visit their pueblos and reservations to purchase high-quality handicrafts and artwork.
sentences.translation: 美国西南部沙漠地区的原住民采取了类似策略，鼓励游客参观他们的村镇和保留地，购买高质量手工艺品和艺术品。

structure.text: Native people in the desert regions of the American Southwest
encouraging tourists to visit their pueblos and reservations to purchase high-quality handicrafts and artwork
to purchase high-quality handicrafts and artwork

difficult_points: encouraging 分词说明策略的具体做法；encourage someone to do 结构嵌套。
第二个 to purchase 表示游客参观的目的。

sentences.sentence: The Acoma and San Ildefonso pueblos have established highly profitable pottery businesses, while the Navajo and Hopi groups have been similarly successful with jewellery.
sentences.translation: 阿科马和圣伊尔德丰索村镇建立了利润丰厚的陶器企业，而纳瓦霍和霍皮族在珠宝方面同样成功。

structure.text: The Acoma and San Ildefonso pueblos
while the Navajo and Hopi groups have been similarly successful with jewellery

difficult_points: while 在此表示对比；have been successful with 表示在某领域成功。
highly profitable 修饰 pottery businesses。

sentences.sentence: Too many people living in fragile environments have lost control over their economies, their culture and their environment when tourism has penetrated their homelands.
sentences.translation: 旅游业进入家园后，太多生活在脆弱环境中的人失去了对经济、文化和环境的控制。

structure.text: Too many people living in fragile environments
have lost control over their economies, their culture and their environment
when tourism has penetrated their homelands

difficult_points: living in... 修饰 people；when 从句使用现在完成时，强调旅游进入后果。
control over 后并列经济、文化和环境。

sentences.sentence: Merely restricting tourism cannot be the solution to the imbalance, because people's desire to see new places will not just disappear.
sentences.translation: 仅仅限制旅游并不能解决这种失衡，因为人们想看新地方的愿望不会凭空消失。

structure.text: because people's desire to see new places will not just disappear

difficult_points: Merely restricting tourism 是动名词主语，merely 表示仅仅。
desire to see 是不定式后置修饰 desire；because 说明限制无效原因。

sentences.sentence: Instead, communities in fragile environments must achieve greater control over tourism ventures in their regions, in order to balance their needs and aspirations with the demands of tourism.
sentences.translation: 相反，脆弱环境中的社区必须加强对本地区旅游项目的控制，以便在自身需求、愿望与旅游业要求之间取得平衡。

structure.text: must achieve greater control over tourism ventures in their regions
in order to balance their needs and aspirations with the demands of tourism

difficult_points: must achieve 表示必要性；control over 指控制对象。
in order to 表示加强控制的目的，balance A with B 表示协调两方。

sentences.sentence: A growing number of communities are demonstrating that, with firm communal decision-making, this is possible.
sentences.translation: 越来越多的社区正在证明，只要坚定地进行集体决策，这是可以实现的。

structure.text: that, with firm communal decision-making, this is possible

difficult_points: a growing number of 后接复数谓语 are；that 从句说明证明内容。
with 短语说明实现目标所需的条件，this 指社区掌控旅游并协调需求。

sentences.sentence: The critical question now is whether this can become the norm, rather than the exception.
sentences.translation: 现在关键的问题是，这能否成为常态，而不是例外。

structure.text: whether this can become the norm, rather than the exception

difficult_points: whether 从句作表语，提出能否成为常态的问题。
rather than the exception 是对比补充，norm 与 exception 相对。
